user_query: Add a task to the 'Garage Repair' project called 'Fix the leaky faucet'.

fields.title: Fix the leaky faucet
fields.description: Fix the leaky faucet in the garage sink; check washers, supply lines, and valves. Replace parts as needed.

result.reasoning: User requested adding a task to the 'Garage Repair' project. Inserted as a new task appended to that project under Household. Defaulted status to Todo and priority to Medium; no due date specified.
